title: more details bare bones
description: redrawing some resource packs in the bare bones style
body:
This resource pack is based on the works of other authors. Each texture is reworked in accordance with the style of "Classic Bare Bones". Some textures and models may differ from the original such resource packs are highlighted with ❗ in the list and under the list it is indicated that this is exactly the same for convenience I have separately brought out a section where resource packs only work with a name change. Do not forget that my resource pack works in conjunction with bare bones

[Classic Bare Bones you can download it here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/classic-bare-bones)   
I recommend you to use it, as I relied on the classical style, as I consider it more beautiful and pleasant.

If you need a specific texture from this pack, you can download it separately  [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GYgm7TUTgYW5YkRUPg-5oCeV-wJ4Rg_m/view)

all resource packs of the latest version:

[\-   Banner Pattern Clarity](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity)  
[\-   Colored Axolotl Buckets](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/colored-axolotl-buckets-with-babies/)  
[\-   Understandable Wool Bare Bones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/understandable-wool-bare-bones)  
[\-   Matching Ores - Barebones Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/barebones-consistent-oars)  
[\-   Colorful Sheared Sheep](http://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/colorful-sheared-sheep)  
[\-   Loaded Crossbows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/loaded-crossbows)  
[\-   Blinking Ender Eyes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/blinking-ender-eyes)  
[\-   Better Map Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-map-items)  
[\-  Spawn Egg 3D](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/spawn-egg-3d)  
[\-  Trims Item Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trims_item_fix)  
[\-   What Painting I'm Looking At?](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wpila)  
[\-   Better Cauldrons](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xxvi-s-better-cauldrons/)  
[\-   Visual Brush Durability❗](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-brush-durability/version/eMHnOntq)  
[\-   Remodeled Cactus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/remodeled-cactus)  ❗  
[\-   Visual Stews](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-stews)   ❗  
[\-   Flowering Lily Pads](\(https:/modrinth.com/resourcepack/flowering-lilly-pads)   ❗  
[\-   Soul furnace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soul-furnace)  
[\-   Flowers Vine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flowers-vine)  
[\-   SnowyBoi64's CIT Utility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cit-utility)   ❗

resource packs changeable by changing the name

[\-   Pablo's Secret Nametags](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pablos-secret-nametags)  
[\-   Salmon Gun](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/salmon-gun)  
[\-   Miku Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/miku-totem)   ❗  
[\-   Gyro Zeppeli Hat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gyro-zeppeli-hat)   ❗  
[\-   MRP | Brawl](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrp-brawl)   ❗  
[\-  FROGBOW!!!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/frogbow/)    ❗

\- Language support (English and Russian) was added to all named packs where it was missing  
\-All name variants are listed in a file inside the resource pack  
\-   Miku Totem — replaces the totem not by default, but when renamed   
\-   MRP | Brawl — added Russian language support  
\-   Gyro Zeppeli Hat — added English language support  
\-   MTW's Pirates CIT Pack — Russian language support added  
\-   frogbow — added all frog variants, with Russian language support  
\-   SnowyBoi64's CIT Utility — from the set is used only: armor stand (item obtained by command), signs (painted and copied via ctrl), maps (created in the style of Better Map Items), frames (invisible obtained by command)  
\-   Visual Brush Durability — changes only the copper element, the brush color itself does not change  
\-   Flowering Lily Pads —  slightly simplified model  
\-   Remodeled Cactus —  added more variations now cacti are not the same type  
\-   Visual Stews —   removed the element symbolizing the effect, now you can see what the stew is made of, but there is no effect hint  
there is also a secret texture, find it :)  
support for any mods was cut everywhere!!!

 **!!! required [optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn) ;  [ETF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) ,  [EMF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features)**
